instruction:
Find the Taylor polynomial $P_{5}$ for the function $f(x) = x \cdot \cos\left(x^2\right)$.

Options:
A. x - \frac{1}{3} \cdot x^4
B. x - \frac{1}{4} \cdot x^6
C. x - \frac{1}{2} \cdot x^6
D. x - \frac{1}{5} \cdot x^5
E. x - \frac{1}{2} \cdot x^4
F. x - \frac{1}{3} \cdot x^6
G. x - \frac{1}{2} \cdot x^5
H. x - \frac{1}{4} \cdot x^5
I. x - \frac{1}{6} \cdot x^5
J. x - \frac{1}{3} \cdot x^5
